section.heading: Tribal health program administration

content.p: The Secretary shall, by contract or otherwise, provide training for individuals in the administration and planning of tribal health programs.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 94–437, title I, § 121, as added Pub. L. 102–573, title I, § 113, Oct. 29, 1992, 106 Stat. 4542.)
